description_long: This bungalow features a modern, angular design with a predominantly flat and slightly sloped roof structure, accented by bold, horizontal striping in black and white. The building is composed of several interconnected rectangular volumes, creating a dynamic L-shaped footprint with multiple wings. Large windows are distributed along the facades, providing ample natural light and visual connection to the outdoors. The exterior includes a mix of solid wall sections and glass, with a visible entryway and a covered porch area. The property is bordered by green lawn sections, enhancing its integration with a suburban or urban neighborhood. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on geometric simplicity.
description: A modern, L-shaped bungalow with flat and sloped roofs, bold black and white striping, and large windows. The design features interconnected rectangular volumes and a covered porch area.
description_view_0: This view highlights the long, horizontal wing of the bungalow, showing the main entry area and the covered porch on the right side.
description_view_1: From this angle, the full length of the main facade is visible, with prominent striping and a row of large windows along the front.
description_view_2: The rear and side of the bungalow are visible here, showing the extension of the L-shape and additional green lawn space.
description_view_3: This perspective reveals the back and side wings, with the green lawn extending from the rear and the roof's geometric pattern clearly visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
